title: Brazilian-Style Poached Salmon with Butter Sauce
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish that combines the richness of butter with the delicate taste of poached salmon.

ingredients.name: Brazilian spices
ingredients.notes: A blend of salt, black pepper, and cumin

instructions: Poach the salmon fillets in simmering water for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Brazilian spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the lime juice and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the salmon from the poaching liquid and serve with the butter sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
